situation_text: When syncope occurs during defecation with unresolved imaging and labs, and high finalize risk due to missing timeline and severity data
action_text: Block FINALIZE_DIAGNOSIS due to high risk and missing critical evidence; prioritize collecting timeline, severity, and targeted exam
outcome_text: Unsafe finalization avoided; system enforced safety rule to prevent premature diagnosis
boundary_text: Apply when syncope during defecation is reported with high finalize risk and missing imaging/labs; do not use when full timeline, severity, and targeted exam are available

action_sequence.action_label: request labs for electrolytes, CBC, lactate
